task_completion.description: Create an email template with the correct subject
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Thunderbird compose window or an email saved in the Templates folder with the Subject line exactly matching 'Warranty Claim Received - Status Update'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct text into the template body
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body of the template email contains the exact text: 'Thank you for reaching out. We have received your warranty claim and our support team will review it within 48 business hours. Please retain this email for your records.'

task_completion.description: Create a message filter with the correct name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Thunderbird 'Filter Rules' dialog is open with the 'Filter name' field set to 'Warranty Auto-Reply'.

task_completion.description: Set the filter condition to match the specified subject
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Filter Rules' dialog, the condition section is set to 'Subject' 'contains' 'Warranty Claim'.

task_completion.description: Set the filter action to reply with the created template
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Filter Rules' dialog, the action section is set to 'Reply with Template' and the 'Warranty Claim Received - Status Update' template is selected in the adjacent dropdown.

task_completion.description: Ensure the filter is enabled and not run on existing messages
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Message Filters' list shows the 'Warranty Auto-Reply' filter with its checkbox checked (enabled). The agent closes the dialog without clicking the 'Run Now' button.

integrity.description: Agent used the Thunderbird GUI to create the template and filter
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with Thunderbird's Compose, Templates, and Message Filters windows, rather than terminal commands editing profile files like msgFilterRules.dat.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Thunderbird application
integrity.visual_evidence: The text inputs and dropdown selections must be within Thunderbird's native interface, not a text editor or web browser.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts to bypass GUI configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show any bash scripts or python scripts being executed to inject the templates or filter rules directly into the system.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Template Subject: 'Warranty Claim Received - Status Update'. Expected Template Body: 'Thank you for reaching out. We have received your warranty claim and our support team will review it within 48 business hours. Please retain this email for your records.'. Expected Filter Name: 'Warranty Auto-Reply'. Expected Filter Condition: Subject contains 'Warranty Claim'. Expected Filter Action: Reply with template.
